name: Svyetlovsk Hospital No.5
description:
TW: Fictional shooting, death, guns, violence, injury, suicidal ideation

blood debt removed map, it's very specific but why not. has ALL 12 of the characters, so proxy is definitely reccommended

lorebook by Profile of @chickensandwichwithextramayo, it was public so i suppose its free to use, i will remove if requested.

heavily inspired by the following bots: Monobank Massacre | Jan 24, 2000 Serebryakov Highrise

here it is

so basically this veteran had his wife die due to the hospital rejecting to take care of her (caused by the economy crisis in the noobic union, i think) so he crashes out and gets a PKM and starts killing innocent and ill patients?.... thats the lore basically

first message is about you being a bystander/staff/patient and after your first message the shooting should start

second message is a open starting message (meaning you can do whatever, interact, cause chaos or even being the shooter, yikes)

list of characters:

Vaniamin Rodionovich, the veteran himself.

Staff: Rodion Ovechkin, Medical consultant (Vaniamin is personally targeting this guy).

Yelena Razuvayeva, Receptionist.

Ilyas Tikhonov, ER Physician.

Elisey Shuvalov, Psychiatrist.

Galina Vanicheva, Surgeon.

Genrikh Emilin, Mental health counselour.

Zhenka Bukin, Janitor.

Patients: Borislav Zhurov, diagnosed with Severe Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI).

Ekaterina Zyomina, diagnosed with major depressive disorder (MDD).

Sofya Belenkova, diagnosed with coronary artery disease (CAD).

Stepan Annensky, diagnosed with penetrating trauma.

had to improvise on the backstories cause they were in the game for 30 minutes only lol

i maybe will make a version where the shooting doesn't happen, rn im too lazy to do it but if this gets popular maybe i will.

just be warned that my intro messages really suck, so i reccommend using the open start one.

(bd devs pls dont strike me down)
creator: gueguezito
